sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the character (black with white dots) is now on the RIGHT side of the divider, and the dark gray shape is on the LEFT side. It seems like the character crossed the divider and the dark gray shape stayed behind. The character is now closer to the yellow L-shape at the bottom right.
Let me check the current positions and figure out how to reach the yellow shape.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    if b:
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} hash={n['hash'][:8]}... bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
